summary: Sicurezza Cantieri (POS Generator) Module - Complete testing of backend CRUD + AI generation + PDF, and frontend 3-step wizard. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: sidebar shows 'Sicurezza (POS)' with HardHat icon, /sicurezza list page with empty state, 3-step wizard (Cantiere→Lavorazioni→Macchine&DPI), risk checkboxes grouped by category (13 risks), machine checkboxes (14 machines), DPI checkboxes (13 DPI), save creates POS, AI generation with GPT-4o works, PDF download available.

backend.GET /api/sicurezza/rischi: PASS - Returns 13 risks, 14 machines, 13 DPI (public endpoint)
backend.POST /api/sicurezza/: PASS - Creates POS with cantiere data, selected_risks, machines, DPI
backend.GET /api/sicurezza/: PASS - Returns list with pagination and total count
backend.GET /api/sicurezza/{pos_id}: PASS - Returns single POS with all fields
backend.PUT /api/sicurezza/{pos_id}: PASS - Updates POS fields and status
backend.DELETE /api/sicurezza/{pos_id}: PASS - Deletes POS, returns 404 on subsequent GET
backend.POST /api/sicurezza/{pos_id}/genera-risc: PASS - AI risk assessment with GPT-4o works, saves to database

frontend.Landing page 'CRM PER FABBRI E CARPENTER: PASS - Badge visible on landing page
frontend.Landing page 'Il Ferro, Organizzato': PASS - Heading visible on landing page
frontend./sicurezza page loads with empty state: PASS - Shows 'Nessun POS trovato' and 'Crea il primo POS' button
frontend.Table columns: PASS - Progetto, Cantiere, Cliente, Rischi, AI, Stato
frontend.Wizard Step 1 (Cantiere): PASS - Project name, client select, address, city, duration, start date, committente, responsabile, coordinatore
frontend.Wizard Step 2 (Lavorazioni): PASS - 13 risk checkboxes grouped by 4 categories (Lavorazioni a caldo, Lavorazioni meccaniche, Rischi specifici, Rischi chimici)
frontend.Wizard Step 3 (Macchine & DPI): PASS - 14 machine checkboxes, 13 DPI checkboxes, both grouped by category
frontend.Save POS: PASS - Creates POS, shows 'POS creato' toast
frontend.AI Generate button: PASS - Visible after save, triggers AI risk assessment
frontend.AI Risk Assessment: PASS - GPT-4o generates assessment, shows 'Valutazione Rischi Generata' section

test_credentials: Created test users/sessions dynamically for both pytest and Playwright testing
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test POS documents during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sicurezza Cantieri (POS Generator) module fully tested and working. All backend CRUD operations pass. AI generation with GPT-4o via emergentintegrations.llm.chat works correctly. Frontend 3-step wizard works: Step 1 collects cantiere data, Step 2 shows 13 risks grouped by 4 categories, Step 3 shows 14 machines and 13 DPI grouped by category. After save, AI and PDF buttons appear. AI generates substantial risk assessment text. No mocked APIs - all integrations are real using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
mocked_api_note: None - all APIs including GPT-4o AI integration are fully implemented and working
